utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all six top-level items. Now check each for full specification according to what should be covered: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price. It provides two options with name, address, price, size, features, monthly fees, property taxes, viewing times. This satisfies details and price. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms. It provides two options with program, down payment, mortgage amount, monthly payment, interest rate, incentive, arrangement fee. Terms are covered. 3) legal_services: includes provider, contact, service, cost, includes. Costs are specified. 4) moving_services: provider, contact, service, cost, includes. Costs specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services. It provides options with service, cost, includes; one option also lists provider. This meets requirement. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown. It provides totals per property and notes available funds and remaining funds. While not an exhaustive breakdown line-by-line, it does aggregate property plus services and shows totals, which satisfies a complete cost breakdown at a rough-draft level. Therefore all 6 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes two purchase property options: 'Arts District Loft' and 'Financial District Contemporary'. In the ground-truth ratings for purchase_properties, these correspond to 'Commercial Conversion' (CAD $380K, 110m², arts district/converted warehouse) and 'New Build' (CAD $480K, 95m², smart home features) respectively. The financing program used is 'First-Time Buyer Program', which maps to 'First-Time Buyer' under purchase_financing. The legal services selected is 'Premium Legal Package' which directly maps under essential_legal_services. The moving service chosen is 'Premium Moving Service', which maps to 'Premium Moving'. The setup services include 'Premium Utilities Package' mapping to 'Premium Utilities' and 'Smart Home Package' mapping to 'Smart Home Package' under utility_setup.
